prompt_format: Join each prompt_lines array with newline characters to recover the complete prompt used for that asset.

prompt_lines: Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: 1:1 ecommerce template preview for a high-information B2B product page

Input images: Image 1 is an information-structure and text-density reference only, NOT an edit target. Learn only its hierarchy of a large title, explanatory subtitle, central hero product, four surrounding photo-detail modules, and concise explanatory copy. Do NOT copy BOFITCAP, any logo, "20+", "3-5 DAYS", any brand marks, any numeric promise, or any pictured decorative badge/embroidery from Image 1.
Primary request: Create a new premium high-density procurement overview infographic for one unbranded structured baseball cap.
Scene/backdrop: bright warm-white studio background with subtle pale-gray content zoning; no large empty areas.

Subject: one large clean deep navy blue unbranded structured baseball cap, six-panel cotton twill, curved brim, tonal stitching, small breathable eyelets, and a brass-tone adjustable rear buckle. The front panel must be completely blank with no embroidery, logo, patch, badge, letters, symbol, or brand.
Supporting images: exactly four surrounding photographic detail modules, each with a distinct close-up image and two text lines:
1) cotton twill weave macro,
2) curved brim and multi-row stitching macro,
3) brass-tone adjustable rear buckle close-up,
4) crown ventilation eyelets close-up.
Bottom area: three or four small color variants of the identical cap silhouette, in navy, black, forest green, and burgundy.

Style/medium: photorealistic high-end ecommerce product photography fused with a crisp editorial information graphic; realistic textile weave, precise seams, clean product cutouts, professional catalog finish.

Composition/framing: square 1:1; large title and subtitle across the top; hero cap centered at about 45% of the canvas; four clearly bounded image-and-copy modules arranged around the hero without overlap; color variants in a compact bottom band; effective visual occupancy about 80%; information-rich at first glance; all hierarchy remains legible in a thumbnail; do not use a simple pure-photo composition.
Lighting/mood: neutral premium softbox lighting, controlled realistic shadows, high material clarity.
Color palette: deep navy, warm white, charcoal typography, subtle brass accents, restrained forest and burgundy variants.
Text (verbatim; render every line exactly, clearly readable, and render NO OTHER TEXT):
Title: "PREMIUM STRUCTURED BASEBALL CAP"
Subtitle: "Six-panel construction | Adjustable everyday fit"
Module 1 heading: "COTTON TWILL"
Module 1 explanation: "Dense diagonal weave"
Module 2 heading: "CURVED BRIM"
Module 2 explanation: "Reinforced multi-row stitching"
Module 3 heading: "ADJUSTABLE BUCKLE"
Module 3 explanation: "Secure metal closure"
Module 4 heading: "BREATHABLE EYELETS"
Module 4 explanation: "Ventilation around the crown"
Bottom label: "COLOR OPTIONS"

Typography: clean bold condensed sans-serif for title and module headings; smaller highly legible sans-serif for explanations; exact spelling and punctuation; no distorted, duplicate, truncated, invented, or decorative text.

Constraints: all four supporting modules must contain an actual relevant close-up photo plus its heading and explanation; at least five readable label areas; at least 25 clearly readable English words total; keep the exact same cap design across hero, close-ups, and color variants; no unverified claims; no numbers anywhere.

Avoid: BOFITCAP, copied reference logos, any brand, any logo, embroidery, front mark, patch, badge, watermark, certification, certificate icon, MOQ, lead time, capacity, price, percentage, performance statistic, numeric promise, fictional customer, world map, flag, gibberish, fake microcopy, blank poster space, pure product photography without information modules.
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: 1:1 ecommerce template preview for a high-information B2B product set

Input images: Image 1 is information hierarchy and text-density reference only; learn its large title, explanatory subtitle, central product, surrounding photographic modules, and readable explanations, but do not copy BOFITCAP, its logos, "20+", "3-5 DAYS", any number, branding, embroidery, or promise. Image 2 is the product-identity and minimum-density anchor; preserve its exact unbranded deep navy six-panel cotton-twill cap, curved brim, tonal stitching, breathable eyelets, brass-tone rear buckle, premium realism, and information richness, but do not copy its four-corner layout.

Composition/framing: square 1:1; title and subtitle on top; hero cap occupies about 50%; four offset circular or rounded macro windows follow a dynamic radial path rather than four equal corner cards; every module contains a real detail photo, a heading, and one explanatory sentence; effective content occupancy about 80%; at least five readable label zones.
Lighting/mood: soft neutral studio lighting with crisp textile and hardware texture.

Module 1 heading: "SIX-PANEL CROWN"

Module 3 heading: "ADJUSTABLE BUCKLE"

Module 4 explanation: "Finished openings sit around the crown"
Footer label: "DEEP NAVY COTTON TWILL"
Typography: bold condensed sans-serif headings and clean readable sans-serif explanations; exact spelling; no invented microcopy.
Constraints: blank unbranded front; all modules match the same cap; at least 25 clear English words; no numeric claims.

Avoid: brands, logos, patches, decorative embroidery, trademarks, watermarks, certificates, certification icons, MOQ, lead time, capacity, price, percentage, performance statistic, fictional customer, world map, flag, gibberish, pure photography, large blank space.
